_comment: Skeleton patch input for share-public/python_scripts/patch_dbc.py. Each entry will be appended to Achievement.dbc. Locale fields are filled with the English string for all 16 locales in a follow-up step. category=9000 corresponds to a new 'Kill Collector' category that should be added via Achievement_Category.dbc (or by reusing an existing category id if a separate category is undesired).

entries.description_lang: Slay at least one of every Dragonkin in the Eastern Kingdoms (open world and instances).
Slay at least one of every Humanoid in the Eastern Kingdoms (open world and instances).
